step1.title: Hello, welcome to Victus Journal
step1.description: Your journal for habits, thoughts, and experiences. Take control of your life!

step2.title: Create your habits and goals
step2.description: Create your habits one by one, set goals, and get your **general journal** to fill out.

step3.title: Create deltas for each habit
step3.description: Get detailed data about your behaviors in your analytics.

step4.title: View your analytics
step4.description: With analytics, you can see your performance and progress towards your goals.
